title: Supervisor continuation
summary: The supervisor MUST continue each non-terminal run until the harness reaches an operator-owned or terminal pending action.
instructions: The supervisor MUST inspect `pending_action`, perform only that action, and re-check `pending_action` after every harness transition.
The supervisor MUST continue without operator handoff while `pending_action` is `prepare_invocation`, `invoke_agent`, or `supervisor_assessment`.
The supervisor MUST stop for operator input only when `pending_action` is `operator_approval`, `operator_decision`, or `none`.
The supervisor MUST NOT ask the operator to resume a run while a supervisor-owned pending action remains.
